mano_cua.result_summary: 上传附件 openclaw.json 成功后，点击下载按钮（↓图标），未触发文件下载，而是打开了一个新浏览器标签页并导航到当前页面URL。下载按钮实现错误，传入URL可能为undefined或空字符串，导致浏览器回退到当前页面。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The download button did NOT trigger a file download - instead it opened a new browser tab with the same URL as the current page. This is a bug in the application.
